roa.docketEntryComment: APP/ORDER REL EXHBTS-PPL'S EXHBTS REL TO INSP TIMOTHY LOUIE 091714
SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORDER RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED

/CAL:TO CORRECT ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT PER CDC LETTER/NP/X:COURT AMENDED THEABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS- SENTENCE ON ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 12022,53(B)PC ON COUNT 2 IS 10 YEARS IN STATE PRISON TO RUN CONCURRECNT,/X:SENTENCE ON ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 667(A)(1)PC ON COUNT 2  - 5 YEARS IN STATE PRISON IS STRICKEN,/X:ALL THE OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN THE SAME,/

/AJW/CH1 SP  6 Y M/STATES/ENH CH1 TYPE  12022,53(B) TI 10 Y CS//ENH:CH1:TYPE  667(A)(1):TI 5 Y:CS/TEXT:TOTAL 21 YEARS//ENH:CH2:TYPE 12022,53(B):TI 10 Y:CC/ENH:CH2:TYPE 667(A)(1):TI 5 Y:CC//X:THE ENHANCEMENTS IN COUNTS 1 & 2 PURSUANT TO 12022,5(A) PC/X:ARE STAYED,/X:THE ENHANCEMENT PURSUANT TO 667,5(B) PC IS STAYED,/667(D)(E)//X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 332 DAYS/X:COUNTY JAIL, 49 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 381 DAYS,/CTORD:EXHIBITS 8, 15,16 & 17 RELEASED FOR RETURN TO VICTIM/VF5:$4200/PAR/CDC/

/CAL JURY DELIBERATIONS//X:THE JURY RETURNS VERDICTS OF GUILT ON COUNTS 1, 2 AND 3//X:ALLEGATIONS PURSUANT TO 12022,5(A)PC ON COUNTS 1 AND 2 FOUND TRUE,/X:ALLEGATIONS PURSUANT TO 667(A)(1), 667(B) PC ARE FOUND TO BE TRUE,/X:ALLEGATIONS PURSUANT TO 667(D)(E) PC ARE FOUND TO BE TRUE,/
/X:CAUSE ON CALENDAR IN ERROR, THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL/DAW/DEF:IS ILL AND UNAVAILABLE THIS DATE/
/X:SEE MINUTES OF  07-22-99, DEPARTMENT 22;//X:MATTER CURRENTLY IN TRIAL IN DEPARTMENT 25/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, PRETRIAL MOTIONS /ARG&SUB/X:THE COURT MAKES ORDERS, SEE RECORD,/
/CONT/TRANSF FROM DEPT 22 TO DEPT 26 - PRETRIAL CONFERENCE
CONT TO 3/9/99 2PM FOR PTC & 3/22/99/930AM FOR TRIAL IN DEPT 22
/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/
